businessType.description: Plain-English business model or industry label.

monthlyRevenue.description: Typical monthly revenue or cash inflow from operations.

monthlyExpenses.description: Typical monthly operating expenses before optional add-ons such as debt, owner draws, and one-time expenses.

debtPayments.description: Monthly debt service or financing payments.

ownerDraws.description: Monthly owner draws, distributions, or owner compensation paid from business cash.

expectedInflows.description: Expected monthly inflows not already included in monthly revenue.

upcomingLargeExpenses.description: Expected monthly or near-term large expenses to include in gross burn.

fundingGoal.description: Optional funding amount the owner is considering.

biggestConcern.description: Owner's main financial concern or decision question.
